summary: Build W14 (~20 mi) — test week banked. Wed's 3K TT ran 13:13 (7:05/mi, road, 80F) — VDOT 42.85 raw / ~43.5 heat-adj, 5K equiv 22:43 = the Tier C read confirmed → full pace recalc (Adj #202): T 7:45-7:50, I 7:00-7:15, M 8:15-8:25, R 6:35-6:45, easy holds 9:15-10:30; MHR datum 195 (Adj #203). Calendar RESOLVED (Adj #204): both spare weeks into Build — now W13-W20 (added load W19 with the cut-down test + deload W20), Sharpen W21-W24, Taper W25-W27, race W27 Sat 10-24. Fri runs 6x3 min @ I on 2:30 rec at the new band's slow end 7:10-7:15 (Adj #178/#202). Sat: no scheduled bump — all holds/rebuilds; pushdown runs 27.5 (Adj #198). Hill strides next slot W15 Mon (Adj #194).

days.note: Logged — 35 min treadmill @ 10:31/mi avg, 0.5% incline, ~3.3 mi; cadence 169; HR avg 164 (display-only); no pain reported = clean by default (Adj #188). Hill strides SKIPPED — unperformed since W10 Mon 6-22, next slot W15 Mon (Adj #194).

Logged — 13:13 (7:05/mi), road, 80F, cadence 179, HR 182 avg / 195 peak (display-only → MHR datum 195, Adj #203); beat the 13:30-13:55 target by 17 s. VDOT 42.85 raw / ~43.5 heat-adj, 5K equiv 22:43 → pace recalc Adj #202. First Vomero quality outing clean (Adj #201); no pain reported = clean by default (Adj #188).

Second I-pace session — shorter recoveries do the progressing. New band 7:00-7:15 (Adj #202): run the slow end 7:10-7:15, no off-band closer (Adj #178); fast end earned after this lands. 48 h post-maximal-3K — honest §11.C morning check decides.
